/usr/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG --specs=nosys.specs -nostartfiles -Wl,--script=/home/nick/development/pico/pico-sdk/src/rp2040/boot_stage2/boot_stage2.ld -Wl,-Map=/home/nick/development/RaspberryPIPico/blink/build/pico-sdk/src/rp2040/boot_stage2/bs2_default.elf.map CMakeFiles/bs2_default.dir/compile_time_choice.S.o -o bs2_default.elf
